message.content:
@startuml
participant "C" as C

participant "signUp" as signUp
signUp -.. -id : int
signUp -.. -firstName : string
signUp -.. -lastName : string
signUp -.. -userName : string
signUp -.. -email : string
signUp -.. -password : string
signUp +.. +signUp() : void

participant "User" as User
User -.. -id : int
User -.. -userName : string
User -.. -password : string
User +.. +logIn() : void
User +.. +signup() : int

participant "signIn" as signIn
signIn -.. -userName : string
signIn -.. -password : string
signIn +.. +logIn() : void
signIn +.. +getUserId() : int

participant "registerItem" as registerItem
registerItem -.. -id : int
registerItem -.. -description : string

participant "determinesWithoutAction" as determinesWithoutAction
determinesWithoutAction -.. -id : int

participant "incubate" as incubate
incubate -.. -id : int

participant "reference" as reference
reference -.. -id : int

participant "determinesWithAction" as determinesWithAction
determinesWithAction -.. -id : int

participant "delegate" as delegate
delegate -.. -id : int

participant "planAction" as planAction
planAction -.. -id : int

participant "Date" as Date
Date -.. -year : int
Date -.. -month : int
Date -.. -day : int
Date +.. +Date(year : int, month : int, day : int)
Date +.. +getYear() : int
Date +.. +getMonth() : int
Date +.. +getDay() : int
Date +.. +setYear(year : int) : void
Date +.. +setMonth(month : int) : void
Date +.. +setDay(:int) : void

signUp ..> User : signup
User ..> signIn : signIn
User ..> registerItem : registerItem
User ..> determinesWithoutAction : determinesWithoutAction
User ..> incubate : incubate
User ..> reference : reference
User ..> determinesWithAction : determinesWithAction
User ..> delegate : delegate
User ..> planAction : planAction
Date ..> Date : Date
@enduml
